variables.name: use_elastic_ip
variables.description: Allocate an Elastic IP for stable WireGuard endpoint. Recommended true to prevent IP change on EC2 stop/start.

variables.name: aws_region
variables.description: AWS region to deploy EC2 WireGuard server into.

variables.name: ami_id
variables.description: Ubuntu 22.04 AMI ID for EC2 instance. Must match the target region.

variables.name: instance_type
variables.description: EC2 instance type (t3.micro sufficient for WireGuard).

variables.name: instance_name
variables.description: Name tag for the EC2 WireGuard server instance.

variables.name: key_name
variables.description: Name of existing EC2 key pair for SSH. Leave empty if using auto_key_pair.

variables.name: auto_key_pair
variables.description: Auto-generate SSH key pair for EC2 access.

variables.name: allowed_ssh_cidr
variables.description: CIDR block allowed SSH access to EC2. Restrict to your IP for security.

variables.name: root_volume_size_gb
variables.description: EC2 root EBS volume size in GB.

variables.name: proxmox_api_url
variables.description: Proxmox API endpoint URL (e.g. https://proxmox.example.com:8006/api2/json).

variables.name: proxmox_tls_insecure
variables.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for Proxmox API. Set false in production.

variables.name: proxmox_node
variables.description: Proxmox node name where the VM will be created.

variables.name: vm_id
variables.description: Unique VM ID in Proxmox (100-999999).

variables.name: vm_name
variables.description: Proxmox VM hostname and display name.

variables.name: template_name
variables.description: Proxmox VM template to clone (Ubuntu cloud-init image).

variables.name: cores
variables.description: Number of vCPU cores for Proxmox VM.

variables.name: memory_mb
variables.description: RAM allocation in MB for Proxmox VM.

variables.name: disk_size_gb
variables.description: Primary disk size in GB for Proxmox VM.

variables.name: storage_pool
variables.description: Proxmox storage pool for VM disk.

variables.name: proxmox_vm_ip
variables.description: Static IP with CIDR for Proxmox VM (e.g. 192.168.1.100/24). Use 'dhcp' for DHCP.

variables.name: proxmox_vm_gateway
variables.description: Default gateway for Proxmox VM. Required when proxmox_vm_ip is not 'dhcp'.

variables.name: proxmox_ssh_user
variables.description: SSH username for Proxmox VM provisioner connection.

variables.name: wg_server_ip
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel IP for EC2 server.

variables.name: wg_client_ip
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel IP for Proxmox client.

variables.name: wg_listen_port
variables.description: WireGuard UDP listen port.

variables.name: wg_server_private_key
variables.description: WireGuard server private key (base64). Generate with: wg genkey

variables.name: wg_server_public_key
variables.description: WireGuard server public key (base64). Generate with: echo <private> | wg pubkey

variables.name: wg_client_private_key
variables.description: WireGuard client private key (base64). Generate with: wg genkey

variables.name: wg_client_public_key
variables.description: WireGuard client public key (base64). Generate with: echo <private> | wg pubkey

variables.name: wg_extra_allowed_ips
variables.description: Extra AllowedIPs for Proxmox WireGuard peer (e.g. '10.0.0.0/16' to route AWS VPC). No leading comma needed.

variables.name: ec2_ssh_private_key_path
variables.description: Path to SSH private key for EC2 provisioner. Only used when auto_key_pair is false.

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Deployment environment tag (dev, staging, prod).
